title: NIO: Closer to Profitability Than Ever
text: NIO's vehicle margin reached 14.7% in Q3 2025, compared with 13.1% in Q3 2024 and 10.3% in Q2 2025. Overall gross margin reached 13.9% in Q3 2025 versus 10.7% in Q3 2024 and 10.0% in Q2 2025. Vehicle gross margin improvement driven by continuous cost optimization and higher-margin vehicle deliveries. Increase from Q3 2024 mainly attributable to increased vehicle margin and parts/accessories/services gross margin from cost reduction and efficiency. Loss from operations decreased 32.8% year-over-year and 28.3% quarter-over-quarter in Q3 2025. Operating cash flow and free cash flow both turned positive in Q3. NIO expects comprehensive gross profit margin reach 20% in 2026. Management aims for quarterly breakeven in Q4 with non-GAAP profitability on full-year basis in 2026. NIO's vehicle margin topped 20% in 2021 but significantly declined, reaching 9.5% by 2023, indicating recent recovery represents meaningful improvement from prior lows.
